creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg Lewis from comment #3)

Thanks for the approval, Greg. Although I think this patch should also go to 2022Q2, but apparently it's not directly applicable without pulling in openjdk18 stuff. Do you have any ideas, what to do there ?

If you think it's not needed, or not worth the hassle, then please feel free to close this PR.

Thanks!
